items.headline: Lithium Is on the Rise Again. Does That Make Albemarle a Buy?
items.snippet: Albemarle paid down a large amount of debt in the first quarter. The lithium miner has also been tightening expenses. In Q1, it grew sales by 33% YoY. Chinese spot lithium prices have climbed back into the $23/kg range, up from $10/kg low in fall 2024. BESS output projected to ju

items.headline: Albemarle: biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand — Citi
items.snippet: Citi raised ALB from High Risk to Buy, PT $225. Global ESS battery production ~950 GWh this year (+35% YoY), expanding to ~1,300 GWh by 2027.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: RBC: lithium supply tight through 2027, market likely balanced to under-supplied through 2050. 2026/2027 EBITDA $2.8B/$2.9B. Outperform, PT $257.
